title: Analyze US customs clearance, duties, and required documentation for importing 500 electronics development boards (FCC/CE certified LoRa devices)
description: Research CBP import process for electronics from China. Check HS codes for dev boards/radio modules (likely 8517.62 or similar), typical duty rates (0-5%?), de minimis rules if applicable, required forms (FDA? no, FCC certs help), broker needs. Estimate duties, VAT if any, clearance fees. List docs: invoice, certs of conformity, country of origin. Acceptance: process summary, estimated addl costs, checklist in beads notes.
